title: margin-inline
description: Sets margins on the inline axis — left and right in horizontal writing modes. margin-inline: auto is the modern, direction-aware way to center a block element horizontally.
html:
Centered block

Uses a single logical property instead of two physical ones.
challenge: Center the card horizontally using a single logical property — without using margin: auto or individual margin-left / margin-right.

alternatives.name: padding-block for vertical spacing
alternatives.description: The block axis is the vertical axis in horizontal writing modes. padding-block: 1rem sets top and bottom padding in one declaration — a common pattern for section padding that should adapt to writing direction.

realWorldUsage: Logical properties pay off in projects that support multiple writing directions — margin-inline: auto centers correctly in both LTR and RTL layouts. They're also increasingly used in design systems as a direction-neutral convention, even for single-language sites.
